results.raw_response: {"reasoning": "Substituted equality constraint to eliminate x2, yielding a quadratic in x1, x3. Unconstrained minimum violated 14x1 - 5x3 <= 0. Minimizing along that active constraint gave x1 = 26/159, x3 = 364/795, x2 = 208/795. Objective value = -676/795 ≈ -0.8503, feasible and KKT optimal.", "answer": -0.85}
